task_completion.description: Navigate the map view to Dubai Marina, UAE
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view should show the distinct canal layout and skyscrapers of Dubai Marina. Coordinates 25.08N, 55.14E may be visible in the status bar.

task_completion.description: Tilt the camera view to display 3D building geometry
task_completion.visual_evidence: The view should be oblique (not top-down), showing the vertical facades of the skyscrapers to allow for shadow rendering.

task_completion.description: Activate the sunlight or shadow visualization feature in the application
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sunlight, shadow, or time-slider tool panel should be open or active in the interface.

task_completion.description: Set the simulation date to June 21 and time to 4:00 PM (16:00)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application's time/date controls should clearly display 'June 21' and '16:00' or '4:00 PM'.

task_completion.description: Verify that shadows are visible and cast in the correct direction (ESE) for the specified time
task_completion.visual_evidence: Shadows must be visible on the ground or water. Since the sun is WNW (late afternoon), shadows must extend towards the ESE. Shadows should be relatively long.

task_completion.description: Save the final view to the specified file path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog, notification, or terminal command showing the screenshot being saved to '/home/ga/shadow_assessment.png'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent is interacting with a 3D mapping application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a GUI for a mapping tool (e.g., Marble, Google Earth, etc.) with interactive elements, not a static image viewer or web image search.

integrity.description: Ensure the image was not generated purely via terminal scripts
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen using Python scripts or ImageMagick to synthetically generate or download the shadow image without using the GUI app.

integrity.description: Ensure date/time settings were changed via the application UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be observed manipulating sliders or input fields in the application, not editing a text configuration file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target location: Dubai Marina (25.08N, 55.14E). Target time: June 21, 16:00 GST (UTC+4). Solar position: On this date/time, the sun is in the West-Northwest (Azimuth ~285°). Therefore, shadows must be cast toward the East-Southeast (ESE). Shadows should be clearly visible and elongated due to the late afternoon sun.
